case_title: MELVIN CASTILLO VS. RICHARD WAN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA AN INDIVIDUAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MELVIN SERVED MAY-03-2019, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA AN INDIVIDUAL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUN-10-2019 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MELVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAN, RICHARD AN INDIVIDUAL PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA AN INDIVIDUAL $8,654.25 PRINCIPAL, $134.42 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,988.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MELVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICASSO, JOSE MIRANDA AN INDIVIDUAL $17,985.18 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,985.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $8,966.51 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MELVIN
